description_long: This is a heavily armored, futuristic combat tactical vehicle with a low, angular profile and a wide, robust chassis. The vehicle features multiple large-caliber cannons and missile launchers mounted on a reinforced turret, with prominent barrels and sensor pods. Its exterior is predominantly matte black with striking orange highlights and geometric accents, giving it a high-tech, intimidating appearance. The sides of the vehicle display exposed track mechanisms and armored skirts, suggesting enhanced mobility and protection. The front is sharply pointed with additional armor plating and integrated lighting or sensor elements. The overall design emphasizes durability, firepower, and advanced technology, suitable for urban combat scenarios.
description: A futuristic, heavily armored combat vehicle with multiple large cannons, matte black body, and orange highlights, designed for urban warfare.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed armored nose, three large cannons, and orange-lit details on the turret and hull.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the exposed track system, side armor skirts, and the full length of the weapon mounts.
description_view_2: Rear view of the vehicle's broad, armored back and the rear ends of the cannons, with minimal visible detail.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the track system, side armor, and weapon mounts from the opposite angle.
attribute_weapon_mounts: Three large-caliber cannons and two missile launchers mounted on the turret roof; all forward-facing.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, angular armor plating; reinforced front and turret; sloped and modular panels visible.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid matte black with orange geometric highlights; no traditional camouflage pattern.
